relations.label: head of government
relations.comment: head of the executive power of this town, city, municipality, state, country, or other governmental body

relations.label: country
relations.comment: sovereign state that this item is in (not to be used for human beings)

relations.label: place of birth
relations.comment: most specific known birth location of a person, animal or fictional character

relations.label: place of death
relations.comment: most specific known (e.g. city instead of country, or hospital instead of city) death location of a person, animal or fictional character

relations.label: father
relations.comment: male parent of the subject. For stepfather, use "stepparent" (P3448)

relations.label: mother
relations.comment: female parent of the subject.

relations.label: spouse
relations.comment: the subject has the object as their spouse (husband, wife, partner, etc.).

relations.label: country of citizenship
relations.comment: the object is a country that recognizes the subject as its citizen

relations.label: continent
relations.comment: continent of which the subject is a part

relations.label: instance of
relations.comment: type to which this subject corresponds/belongs. Different from P279 (subclass of); for example: K2 is an instance of mountain; volcanoes form a subclass of mountains, and the volcano is a type (instance) of volcanic landform

relations.label: head of state
relations.comment: official with the highest formal authority in a country/state

relations.label: capital
relations.comment: seat of government of a country, province, state or other type of administrative territorial entity

relations.label: official language
relations.comment: language designated as official by this item

relations.label: position held
relations.comment: subject currently or formerly holds the object position or public office

relations.label: child
relations.comment: subject has object as child. Do not use for stepchildren?use "relative" (P1038), qualified with "type of kinship" (P1039)

relations.label: author
relations.comment: main creator(s) of a written work (use on works, not humans)

relations.label: member of sports team
relations.comment: sports teams or clubs that the subject represents or represented

relations.label: director
relations.comment: director(s) of film, TV-series, stageplay, video game or similar

relations.label: screenwriter
relations.comment: person(s) who wrote the script for subject item

relations.label: educated at
relations.comment: educational institution attended by subject

relations.label: composer
relations.comment: person(s) who wrote the music [for lyricist, use "lyrics by" (P676)]

relations.label: member of political party
relations.comment: the political party of which a person is or has been a member or otherwise affiliated

relations.label: employer
relations.comment: person or organization for which the subject works or worked

relations.label: founded by
relations.comment: founder or co-founder of this organization, religion, place or entity

relations.label: league or competition
relations.comment: league or competition in which team or player has played, or in which an event occurs

relations.label: publisher
relations.comment: organization or person responsible for publishing books, periodicals, printed music, podcasts, games or software

relations.label: owned by
relations.comment: owner of the subject

relations.label: located in the administrative territorial entity
relations.comment: the item is located on the territory of the following administrative entity.

relations.label: genre
relations.comment: creative work's genre or an artist's field of work (P101). Use main subject (P921) to relate creative works to their topic

relations.label: operator
relations.comment: person, profession, organization or entity that operates the equipment, facility, or service

relations.label: religion or worldview
relations.comment: religion of a person, organization or religious building, or associated with this subject

relations.label: contains the administrative territorial entity
relations.comment: (list of) direct subdivisions of an administrative territorial entity

relations.label: follows
relations.comment: immediately prior item in a series of which the subject is a part, preferably use as qualifier of P179

relations.label: followed by
relations.comment: immediately following item in a series of which the subject is a part, preferably use as qualifier of P179 [if the subject has been replaced, e.g. political offices, use "replaced by" (P1366)]

relations.label: headquarters location
relations.comment: city or town where an organization's headquarters is or has been situated. Use P276 qualifier for specific building

relations.label: cast member
relations.comment: actor in the subject production

relations.label: producer
relations.comment: person(s) who produced the film, musical work, theatrical production, etc. (for film, this does not include executive producers, associate producers, etc.)

relations.label: award received
relations.comment: award or recognition received by a person, organization or creative work

relations.label: creator
relations.comment: maker of this creative work or other object (where no more specific property exists)

relations.label: parent taxon
relations.comment: closest parent taxon of the taxon in question

relations.label: ethnic group
relations.comment: subject's ethnicity (consensus is that a VERY high standard of proof is needed for this field to be used. In general this means 1) the subject claims it themselves, or 2) it is widely agreed on by scholars, or 3) is fictional and portrayed as such)

relations.label: performer
relations.comment: actor, musician, band or other performer associated with this role or musical work

relations.label: manufacturer
relations.comment: (main or final) manufacturer or producer of this product

relations.label: developer
relations.comment: organization or person that developed the item

relations.label: part of the series
relations.comment: series which contains the subject

relations.label: twinned administrative body
relations.comment: twin towns, sister cities, twinned municipalities and other localities that have a partnership or cooperative agreement, either legally or informally acknowledged by their governments

relations.label: legislative body
relations.comment: legislative body governing this entity; political institution with elected representatives, such as a parliament/legislature or council

relations.label: basin country
relations.comment: country that have drainage to/from or border the body of water

relations.label: located in or next to body of water
relations.comment: body of water on or next to which a place is located

relations.label: military branch
relations.comment: branch to which this military unit, award, office, or person belongs, e.g. Royal Navy

relations.label: record label
relations.comment: brand and trademark associated with the marketing of subject music recordings and music videos

relations.label: production company
relations.comment: company that produced this film, audio or performing arts work

relations.label: location
relations.comment: location of the object, structure or event.

relations.label: subclass of
relations.comment: this item is a subclass (subset) of that item; ALL instances of this item are instances of that item; different from P31 (instance of), e.g.: volcano is a subclass of mountain (and an instance of volcanic landform); Everest is an instance of mountain

relations.label: has subsidiary
relations.comment: subsidiary of a company or organization; generally a fully owned separate corporation.

relations.label: part of
relations.comment: object of which the subject is a part (if this subject is already part of object A which is a part of object B, then please only make the subject part of object A), inverse property of "has part"

relations.label: original language of film or TV show
relations.comment: language in which a film or a performance work was originally created. Deprecated for written works and songs.

relations.label: platform
relations.comment: platform for which a work was developed or released, or the specific platform version of a software product

relations.label: mouth of the watercourse
relations.comment: the body of water to which the watercourse drains

relations.label: original broadcaster
relations.comment: network(s) or service(s) that originally broadcast a radio or television program

relations.label: member of
relations.comment: organization, club or musical group to which the subject belongs.

relations.label: chairperson
relations.comment: presiding member of an organization, group or body

relations.label: country of origin
relations.comment: country of origin of this item (creative work, food, phrase, product, etc.)

relations.label: has part(s)
relations.comment: part of this subject; inverse property of "part of" (P361). See also "has parts of the class" (P2670).

relations.label: residence
relations.comment: the place where the person is or has been, resident

relations.label: date of birth
relations.comment: date on which the subject was born

relations.label: date of death
relations.comment: date on which the subject died

relations.label: inception
relations.comment: time when an entity begins to exist; for date of official opening use P1619

relations.label: dissolved, abolished or demolished date
relations.comment: point in time at which the subject (organisation, building) ceased to exist

relations.label: publication date
relations.comment: date or point in time when a work was first published or released

relations.label: start time
relations.comment: time an entity begins to exist or a statement starts being valid

relations.label: end time
relations.comment: moment when an entity ceases to exist and a statement stops being entirely valid or no longer be true

relations.label: point in time
relations.comment: date something took place, existed or a statement was true; for providing time use the "refine date" property (P4241)

relations.label: conflict
relations.comment: battles, wars or other military engagements in which the person or item participated

relations.label: characters
relations.comment: characters which appear in this item (like plays, operas, operettas, books, comics, films, TV series, video games)

relations.label: lyricist
relations.comment: author of song lyrics

relations.label: located in/on physical feature
relations.comment: located on the specified (geo)physical feature.

relations.label: participant
relations.comment: person, group of people or organization (object) that actively takes/took part in an event or process (subject).

relations.label: influenced by
relations.comment: the subject (person, idea, etc.) was influenced or inspired by this object entity, e.g. "Heidegger was influenced by Aristotle"

relations.label: location of formation
relations.comment: location where a group or organization was formed

relations.label: parent organization
relations.comment: parent organization of an organization, opposite of subsidiaries (P355)

relations.label: notable work
relations.comment: notable scientific, artistic or literary work, or other work of significance among subject's works

relations.label: separated from
relations.comment: subject was founded or started by separating from identified object

relations.label: narrative location
relations.comment: the narrative of the work is set in this location

relations.label: work location
relations.comment: location where persons or organisations were actively participating in employment, business or other work

relations.label: applies to jurisdiction
relations.comment: the item (institution, law, public office, public register...) or statement belongs to or has power over or applies to the value (a territorial jurisdiction: a country, state, municipality, ...)

relations.label: product or material produced
relations.comment: material or product produced by an organization, industry, facility, or process

relations.label: territory claimed by
relations.comment: administrative divisions that claim control of a given area

relations.label: participant in
relations.comment: event in which a person or organization was/is a participant; inverse of P710 or P1923

relations.label: replaces
relations.comment: person, state or item replaced. Use "structure replaces" (P1398) for structures.

relations.label: replaced by
relations.comment: other person or item which continues the item by replacing it in its role.

relations.label: capital of
relations.comment: country, state, department, canton or other administrative division of which the municipality is the governmental seat

relations.label: languages spoken, written or signed
relations.comment: language(s) that a person or a people speaks, writes or signs, including the native language(s)

relations.label: present in work
relations.comment: this (fictional or fictionalized) entity, place, or person appears in that work as part of the narration

relations.label: sibling
relations.comment: the subject and the object have at least one common parent (brother, sister, etc. including half-siblings)
